name: RENAISSANCERE HOLDINGS LTD
summary: PART I In this Form 10-K, references to RenaissanceRe refer to RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd. (the parent company) and references to we, us, our and the Company refer to RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd. together with its subsidiaries, unless the context requires otherwise. Defined terms used throughout this Form 10-K are included in the Glossary of Defined Terms at the end of Part I, Item 1. Business of this Form 10-K.
